Retrieved knowledge about HTML and CSS:
1. [html] Q: what is HTML? A: HTML (HyperText Markup Language) is a markup language used to create web pages, which includes elements such as headings, paragraphs, images, and links. 2. [css] Q: what is CSS? A: CSS (Cascading Style Sheets) is a style sheet language that defines the presentation of a document written in HTML. It allows developers to apply styles to specific parts of an HTML page or to the entire website.
